snippet.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Everybody wants this. 

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci return in The Devil Wears Prada 2, in theaters May 1. Watch the full trailer now. 

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and NigelвАФMeryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as вАЬLilyвАЭ and вАЬIrvвАЭ from the first film. 
 
вАЬThe Devil Wears Prada 2вАЭ is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

it.title: Il diavolo veste Prada 2 | Trailer ufficiale
it.description:
Tutti lo vogliono.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci tornano ne Il diavolo veste Prada 2, nelle sale dal 1¬∞ maggio. Guarda subito il trailer completo.

Quasi 20 anni dopo la loro iconica interpretazione di Miranda, Andy, Emily e Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci tornano nelle strade alla moda di New York e negli eleganti uffici di Runway Magazine nell'attesissimo sequel del fenomeno del 2006 che ha definito una generazione.

Il film riunisce il cast principale originale con il regista David Frankel e la sceneggiatrice Aline Brosh McKenna, e introduce una passerella di personaggi completamente nuova, tra cui Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak e Conrad Ricamora. Anche Tracie Thoms e Tibor Feldman riprendono i ruoli di "Lily" e "Irv" del primo film.

"Il diavolo veste Prada 2" √® prodotto da Wendy Finerman e i produttori esecutivi sono Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt e Aline Brosh McKenna. Il film debutter√† in esclusiva nelle sale il 1¬∞ maggio.

de-DE.title: Der Teufel tr√§gt Prada 2 | Offizieller Trailer
de-DE.description:
Alle wollen das sehen.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt und Stanley Tucci kehren in вАЮDer Teufel tr√§gt Prada 2вАЬ zur√Љck вАУ ab 1. Mai im Kino. Jetzt den kompletten Trailer ansehen.

Fast 20 Jahre nach ihrem legend√§ren Auftritt als Miranda, Andy, Emily und Nigel kehren Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt und Stanley Tucci in die modischen Stra√Яen von New York City und die eleganten B√Љros des Runway Magazine zur√Љck вАУ in der mit Spannung erwarteten Fortsetzung des Ph√§nomens von 2006, das eine ganze Generation pr√§gte.

Der Film vereint die Originalbesetzung mit Regisseur David Frankel und Drehbuchautorin Aline Brosh McKenna und pr√§sentiert eine komplett neue Riege an Charakteren, darunter Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak und Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms und Tibor Feldman kehren in ihren Rollen als вАЮLilyвАЬ und вАЮIrvвАЬ aus dem ersten Film zur√Љck.

вАЮDer Teufel tr√§gt Prada 2вАЬ wurde von Wendy Finerman produziert, die ausf√Љhrende Produktion √Љbernahmen Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt und Aline Brosh McKenna. Der Film startet am 1. Mai exklusiv in den Kinos.

id.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Trailer Resmi
id.description:
Semua orang menginginkan ini.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, dan Stanley Tucci kembali dalam The Devil Wears Prada 2, tayang di bioskop 1 Mei. Saksikan trailer lengkapnya sekarang.

Hampir 20 tahun setelah memerankan Miranda, Andy, Emily, dan NigelвАФMeryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, dan Stanley Tucci kembali ke jalanan kota New York yang modis dan kantor-kantor mewah Majalah Runway dalam sekuel yang sangat dinantikan dari fenomena tahun 2006 yang mendefinisikan satu generasi.

Film ini menyatukan kembali para pemeran utama asli dengan sutradara David Frankel dan penulis Aline Brosh McKenna, dan memperkenalkan deretan karakter baru termasuk Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak, dan Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms dan Tibor Feldman juga kembali memerankan peran mereka sebagai вАЬLilyвАЭ dan вАЬIrvвАЭ dari film pertama.

вАЬThe Devil Wears Prada 2вАЭ diproduseri oleh Wendy Finerman, dan diproduseri eksekutif oleh Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt, dan Aline Brosh McKenna. Film ini tayang perdana secara eksklusif di bioskop pada 1 Mei.

snippet.description:
Ramayana New Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Ramayana Ranbir Kapoor vs Yash Cinema Created by Namit Malhotra is all set to take Indian Cinema to Pan World Level with World of Ramayana. New Trailer of Ramayana Har Jagah Episode 1 The Jogi Community highlights the History like never before challenging SS Rajamouli Mahesh Babu Varanasi Movie for Box Office Collection Records. Ramayana Yash look vs Ranbir Kapoor first look will set debates on fire but Sunny Deol as Lord Hanuman might be the biggest surprise ever! en.title: Ramayana New Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
en.description:
Ramayana New Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Ramayana Ranbir Kapoor vs Yash Cinema Created by Namit Malhotra is all set to take Indian Cinema to Pan World Level with World of Ramayana. New Trailer of Ramayana Har Jagah Episode 1 The Jogi Community highlights the History like never before challenging SS Rajamouli Mahesh Babu Varanasi Movie for Box Office Collection Records. Ramayana Yash look vs Ranbir Kapoor first look will set debates on fire but Sunny Deol as Lord Hanuman might be the biggest surprise ever! Ramayana Teaser Trailer Expectations & Why Namit Malhotra might change the definition of Ramayana with his new Cinema- Full Details Discussion inside.

#Ramayana #RamayanaTeaser #RamayanaMovie

under the banner of Guppy Cinemas in association with Wayfarer Films releasing in theaters on
5th February 2026.

MADAN GOWRI amoung others.

Welcome to our Tamil Devotional Channel, your ultimate destination for soulful and uplifting Tamil devotional songs. Dive into the divine with our carefully curated collections designed to inspire and bring peace to your soul every day of the week.

Daily Devotional Songs:
* Monday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Tuesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Wednesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Thursday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Friday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Saturday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Sunday Tamil Devotional Songs

Special Devotional Collections:
* Shiva Tamil Devotional Songs: Celebrate the power and grace of Lord Shiva.
* Vishnu Tamil Devotional Songs: Immerse in the blessings of Lord Vishnu.
* Muruga Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke the valor and blessings of Lord Muruga.
* Hanuman Tamil Devotional Songs: Feel the strength and devotion of Lord Hanuman.
* Amman Tamil Devotional Songs: Honor the divine mother in her various forms.
* Saibaba Tamil Devotional Songs: Seek the blessings of Shirdi Sai Baba.
* Balaji Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship Lord Venkateswara with these soulful songs.
* Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Attract prosperity with hymns for Goddess Lakshmi.
* Devi Tamil Devotional Songs: Praise the supreme goddess Devi in her many avatars.
* Ganesh Tamil Devotional Songs: Start your day with prayers to Lord Ganesha.

Special Occasions and Deities:
* Amavasai Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs for the new moon day rituals.
* Pradosham Tamil Devotional Songs: Hymns for the auspicious Pradosham period.
* Ashta Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs dedicated to the eight forms of Goddess Lakshmi.
* Vinayagar Tamil Devotional Songs: Devotions for the remover of obstacles, Lord Vinayagar.
* Ganapathi Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke blessings from Lord Ganapathi.
* Surya Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship the Sun God, Surya, with these melodies.
* Sani Tamil Devotional Songs: Appease Lord Sani with these devotional tracks.
* Guru Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs to honor Guru and seek his wisdom.
* Perumal Tamil Devotional Songs: Devote to Lord Perumal with these spiritual songs.
* Navagraha Tamil Devotional Songs: Balance your energies with songs for the nine planets.

Subscribe now and join our spiritual journey. Like, share, and hit the bell icon to stay updated with our latest devotional uploads. May these divine songs bring peace, prosperity, and positivity to your life.

snippet.title: Border 2 Movie Trailer Review | Sunny Deol Varun Dhawan, Diljit Dosanjh | Songs, Reaction & Box
snippet.description:
Border 2 ek upcoming Bollywood patriotic action-drama movie hai jo 1971 war ke background par based hai. Film mein Sunny Deol, Varun Dhawan, Diljit Dosanjh aur Ahan Shetty jaise strong performers nazar aate hain. Border 2 trailer release hote hi audience ke beech zabardast buzz create ho chuka hai aur log Border 2 trailer review, Border 2 reaction aur Border 2 public review dekh rahe hain.
Border 2 movie ke songs jaise Ishq Da Chehra, Pyaari Lage, Mohabbat Ho Gayi Hai, Ghar Kab Aaoge aur Sandese Aate Hain ne patriotic aur romantic Hindi songs lovers ke dil jeet liye hain. Vishal Mishra, Sonu Nigam, Arijit Singh aur Diljit Dosanjh ke gaane movie ko emotional depth dete hain.
Is video mein aap dekhenge Border 2 movie review, trailer reaction, honest analysis, songs review, performance breakdown, VFX & CGI discussion aur box office prediction. Sunny Deol ke powerful dialogues, Varun Dhawan ke intense army scenes aur Diljit Dosanjh ke emotional moments audience ko theatre tak kheenchne wale hain.
Saath hi is video mein Border 2 box office collection day 1, Border 2 hit or flop, budget, advance booking, Border 3 announcement rumours aur Bollywood latest news in Hindi par bhi baat ki gayi hai.
Agar aapko Border 2 full trailer, Border 2 movie songs, Sunny Deol Border 2 scenes, Varun Dhawan Border 2 memes, Diljit Dosanjh Border 2 song, Bollywood news aur Hindi cinema updates pasand hain, to ye video aapke liye perfect hai.

snippet.title: PREM DHILLON: BADMASH | DSP DEV 2 | DEV KHAROUD | New Punjabi Song 2026 | In Cinemas 13th Feb
snippet.description:
White Hill Music PresentsрЯФ• BADMASH вАУ OUT NOW! рЯФ• Prem Dhillon New Song! Second Song from the much-awaited Punjabi movie DSP DEV 2 рЯОђ 
рЯУЕ DSP DEV 2 releases in cinemas on 13th February 2026 рЯОђрЯНњ 

Experience the power of new Punjabi song 2026 as Prem Dhillon brings pure attitude and dominance with вАЬBADMASHвАЭ. This high-energy track blends bold lyrics, fearless vibes, and intense music, making it a perfect addition to the list of Prem Dhillon songs and trending Punjabi songs of 2026 рЯТ•

With hard-hitting music by Rass and striking visuals, Badmash reflects the raw spirit of DSP DEV 2, delivering a full-on cinematic Punjabi music experience рЯФКрЯФ•

snippet.title: Bhagavanthudu Offical Teaser | Thiruveer | Faria Abdullah | Rishi Nagaraju | GG Vihari | Ravi Panasa
snippet.description:
BHAGAVANTHUDU вАУ OFFICIAL TEASER 

Power. Faith. Revolution.
Witness the rise of 'Bhagavanthudu', a gripping Pan-India cinematic spectacle that questions belief, challenges authority, and unveils a powerful story rooted in truth and rebellion.

With intense performances, striking visuals, and a hard-hitting narrative, 'Bhagavanthudu' promises an unforgettable theatrical experience across languages and regions.

#Bhagavanthudu #BhagavanthuduTeaser #PanIndiaFilm #IndianCinema #TeluguCinema #Thiruveer #FariaAbdullah #GGVihari #RajThota #HiKP #RaviPanasaFilmCorporation #UpcomingMovie #teaseroutnow 

Cast & Crew

Star Cast: Thiruveer, Faria Abdullah, Rishi Nagaraju, Kalakeya Prabhakar, Ravindra Vijay, 
Muralidhar Goud, Shelly, Vinay Varma, Chirag Jani, Balagam Sanjay, Adhire Abhi, Mime Madhu
Jabardasth Jeevan

Crew :

snippet.title: Dhanda Nyoliwala - Deadly Zone (Official Music Video) | Deepesh Goyal | VYRL Haryanvi
snippet.description:
Deadly Zone Official Music Video shows Dhanda Nyoliwala exactly where he belongs вАФ in his element, owning every frame.

Listen to Deadly Zone:
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=mg8tm2qO-JA&si=F0VpnazuyPMh-kFu
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/68LtGqZ3Ulvy1nMcdhEEht?si=fdc3a154cd474bef
Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/us/song/deadly-zone/1872355445


#DeadlyZone #Kohram #DhandaNyoliwala 

Singer/Lyrics/Composer: Dhanda Nyoliwala
Music: Anyvibe
Mix & Master: Romoez

Director: Deepesh Goyal
DOP: Vikcee
Asst.: Ashish Khomera, Ankit Thapa,
Khyati Sharma

Operator: Rupi
EP: Raja 
Production: Alina Russia
Project by: Sumit Bamal

Music release inquiries: contact.vyrlregional@umusic.com

Lyrics:

Indo Aryan Haryanvi Dna
Sida Sida Bolu To Ha Warrior
Konse Country Me Bhejna Tambakhu
Mene Jagha Bata Ibe Kra Courier
Are Race Laani Battiya Pe Gadi Laale Sehar Ke
Bana Dena Fast And Furious
Are Life Drive Phele Din Te Chore Ki R Chal Ri Hai Jma He Notorious
Jit Bi Java Kehar Sa Dhava Banke Cyclone Chori
Dur Hi Reh Ke Kare Gi Jaan Ke Deadly Hai Pura Zone Chori
R Mene Suna Kai Lele Sore Aaj Kal Seradon Chori
Dur Hi Reh Ke Kare Gi Jaan Ke Deadly Hai Pura Zone Chori
 
24 Ghante Busy Rhva Mint Ki Bi Vel Nhi
Sara Sara Din Rave Bajta Mobile Ni
Paa Sake Kudte Me Dil Ke Me Mel Ni
Rahu Haryane Mere Yaar Hai Majhal Ni
Bodara Te Paar Vafadaar Hai Kai Yaar
Kde Kudni Ni Padi Koi Diwaar Hai
Chote Mote Role Nahi Mitra N Gole
Aava Chhut Ke Thana Te Bharo Bhar Hai
Are Tapan Ni Di Date Tika Hoya Time Ho Ya
Kara Hoya Kise Te Karaar Hai
Tere Pure Gaam Gel Mitra Ka Rola
Ek Teri Gela Pura Pura Pyaar Hai
Samne Aaja Bol Na Paate Hojave Hai Mon Chori
Dur Hi Reh Ke Kare Gi Jaan Ke Deadly Hai Pura Zone Chori
R Mene Suna Kai Lele Chore Aaj Kal Seradon Chori
Dur Hi Reh Ke Kare Gi Jaan Ke Deadly Hai Pura Zone Chori
 
R Parso Fly Kra India Te Uk Birmingham Me Chal Ri Trail Ni
Shade Kaale Laaye Versace Aali Chori
Hoodie Lv Pe Chidka Chanel Ni
Haryane Me Puch Tu Jaake Nyoliwala Kon Chori

рЭРУрЭР°рЭРҐрЭРђ рЭРѓрЭРҐрЭРЭрЭРЮрЭР® рЭРђрЭР©рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭРҐрЭРЯрЭРҐрЭРЬрЭРЪрЭР•рЭР•рЭР≤, рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРҐрЭРђ рЭРШрЭР®рЭРЃрЭР≠рЭРЃрЭРЫрЭРЮ рЭРЬрЭР°рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРІрЭРЮрЭР• рЭРҐрЭРІ рЭР†рЭРЮрЭРІрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЪрЭР•, рЭР¶рЭРЪрЭР≤ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭРІрЭР≠рЭРЪрЭРҐрЭРІ рЭРЬрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭР≠рЭРЪрЭРҐрЭРІ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭР©рЭР≤рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР†рЭР°рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭР∞рЭР®рЭРЂрЭР§рЭРђ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЪрЭР≠ рЭР∞рЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭРІрЭР®рЭР≠ рЭРђрЭР©рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭРҐрЭРЯрЭРҐрЭРЬрЭРЪрЭР•рЭР•рЭР≤ рЭРЪрЭРЃрЭР≠рЭР°рЭР®рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР≥рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР® рЭРЫрЭРЮ рЭРЃрЭРђрЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЫрЭР≤ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭР©рЭР≤рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР†рЭР°рЭР≠ рЭР°рЭР®рЭР•рЭРЭрЭРЮрЭРЂ(рЭРђ), рЭРЫрЭРЃрЭР≠ рЭР∞рЭР°рЭРҐрЭРЬрЭР° рЭР∞рЭРЮ рЭРЫрЭРЮрЭР•рЭРҐрЭРЮрЭРѓрЭРЮ рЭРҐрЭРІ рЭР†рЭР®рЭР®рЭРЭ рЭРЯрЭРЪрЭРҐрЭР≠рЭР° рЭРЪрЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭР©рЭРЂрЭР®рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЫрЭР≤ рЭРЯрЭРЮрЭРЭрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЪрЭР• рЭР•рЭРЪрЭР∞ рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЕрЭРАрЭРИрЭРС рЭРФрЭРТрЭРД рЭРЭрЭР®рЭРЬрЭР≠рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭРІрЭРЮ рЭРЯрЭР®рЭРЂ рЭР®рЭРІрЭРЮ рЭР®рЭРЂ рЭР¶рЭР®рЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭР®рЭРЯ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЂрЭРЮрЭРЪрЭРђрЭР®рЭРІрЭРђ рЭРІрЭР®рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЪрЭРЫрЭР®рЭРѓрЭРЮ.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

рЭРЕрЭРАрЭРИрЭРС рЭРФрЭРТрЭРД :-

рЭЩљрЭЪШрЭЪЭ рЭЪ†рЭЪТрЭЪЭрЭЪС рЭЪЬрЭЪЭрЭЪКрЭЪЧрЭЪНрЭЪТрЭЪЧрЭЪР рЭЪЭрЭЪСрЭЪО рЭЪЩрЭЪЫрЭЪШрЭЪЯрЭЪТрЭЪЬрЭЪТрЭЪШрЭЪЧрЭЪЬ рЭЪШрЭЪП рЭЪЬрЭЪОрЭЪМрЭЪЭрЭЪТрЭЪШрЭЪЧ рЭЯЈрЭЯґрЭЯЉ рЭЪКрЭЪЧрЭЪН рЭЯЈрЭЯґрЭЯЉрЭЩ∞, рЭЪЭрЭЪСрЭЪО рЭЩµрЭЩ∞рЭЩЄрЭЪБ рЭЪДрЭЪВрЭЩі рЭЪШрЭЪП рЭЪК рЭЪМрЭЪШрЭЪЩрЭЪҐрЭЪЫрЭЪТрЭЪРрЭЪСрЭЪЭрЭЪОрЭЪН рЭЪ†рЭЪШрЭЪЫрЭЪФ, рЭЪТрЭЪЧрЭЪМрЭЪХрЭЪЮрЭЪНрЭЪТрЭЪЧрЭЪР рЭЪЬрЭЪЮрЭЪМрЭЪС рЭЪЮрЭЪЬрЭЪО рЭЪЛрЭЪҐ рЭЪЫрЭЪОрЭЪЩрЭЪЫрЭЪШрЭЪНрЭЪЮрЭЪМрЭЪЭрЭЪТрЭЪШрЭЪЧ рЭЪТрЭЪЧ рЭЪМрЭЪШрЭЪЩрЭЪТрЭЪОрЭЪЬ рЭЪШрЭЪЫ рЭЪЫрЭЪОрЭЪМрЭЪШрЭЪЫрЭЪНрЭЪЬ рЭЪШрЭЪЫ рЭЪЛрЭЪҐ рЭЪКрЭЪЧрЭЪҐ рЭЪШрЭЪЭрЭЪСрЭЪОрЭЪЫ рЭЪЦрЭЪОрЭЪКрЭЪЧрЭЪЬ рЭЪЬрЭЪЩрЭЪОрЭЪМрЭЪТрЭЪПрЭЪТрЭЪОрЭЪН рЭЪЛрЭЪҐ рЭЪЭрЭЪСрЭЪКрЭЪЭ рЭЪЬрЭЪОрЭЪМрЭЪЭрЭЪТрЭЪШрЭЪЧ, рЭЪПрЭЪШрЭЪЫ рЭЪЩрЭЪЮрЭЪЫрЭЪЩрЭЪШрЭЪЬрЭЪОрЭЪЬ рЭЪЬрЭЪЮрЭЪМрЭЪС рЭЪКрЭЪЬ рЭЪЫрЭЪОрЭЪЯрЭЪТрЭЪОрЭЪ†, рЭЪМрЭЪШрЭЪЦрЭЪЦрЭЪОрЭЪЧрЭЪЭ рЭЪТрЭЪЬ рЭЪЧрЭЪШрЭЪЭ рЭЪКрЭЪЧ рЭЪТрЭЪЧрЭЪПрЭЪЫрЭЪТрЭЪЧрЭЪРрЭЪОрЭЪЦрЭЪОрЭЪЧрЭЪЭ рЭЪШрЭЪП рЭЪМрЭЪШрЭЪЩрЭЪҐрЭЪЫрЭЪТрЭЪРрЭЪСрЭЪЭ.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
рЭРУрЭР°рЭРҐрЭРђ рЭРѓрЭРҐрЭРЭрЭРЮрЭР® рЭРђрЭР©рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭРҐрЭРЯрЭРҐрЭРЬрЭРЪрЭР•рЭР•рЭР≤, рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРҐрЭРђ рЭРШрЭР®рЭРЃрЭР≠рЭРЃрЭРЫрЭРЮ рЭРЬрЭР°рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРІрЭРЮрЭР• рЭРҐрЭРІ рЭР†рЭРЮрЭРІрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЪрЭР•, рЭР¶рЭРЪрЭР≤ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭРІрЭР≠рЭРЪрЭРҐрЭРІ рЭРЬрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭР≠рЭРЪрЭРҐрЭРІ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭР©рЭР≤рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР†рЭР°рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭР∞рЭР®рЭРЂрЭР§рЭРђ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЪрЭР≠ рЭР∞рЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭРІрЭР®рЭР≠ рЭРђрЭР©рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭРҐрЭРЯрЭРҐрЭРЬрЭРЪрЭР•рЭР•рЭР≤ рЭРЪрЭРЃрЭР≠рЭР°рЭР®рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР≥рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР® рЭРЫрЭРЮ рЭРЃрЭРђрЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЫрЭР≤ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭР©рЭР≤рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР†рЭР°рЭР≠ рЭР°рЭР®рЭР•рЭРЭрЭРЮрЭРЂ(рЭРђ), рЭРЫрЭРЃрЭР≠ рЭР∞рЭР°рЭРҐрЭРЬрЭР° рЭР∞рЭРЮ рЭРЫрЭРЮрЭР•рЭРҐрЭРЮрЭРѓрЭРЮ рЭРҐрЭРІ рЭР†рЭР®рЭР®рЭРЭ рЭРЯрЭРЪрЭРҐрЭР≠рЭР° рЭРЪрЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭР©рЭРЂрЭР®рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЫрЭР≤ рЭРЯрЭРЮрЭРЭрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЪрЭР• рЭР•рЭРЪрЭР∞ рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЕрЭРАрЭРИрЭРС рЭРФрЭРТрЭРД рЭРЭрЭР®рЭРЬрЭР≠рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭРІрЭРЮ рЭРЯрЭР®рЭРЂ рЭР®рЭРІрЭРЮ рЭР®рЭРЂ рЭР¶рЭР®рЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭР®рЭРЯ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЂрЭРЮрЭРЪрЭРђрЭР®рЭРІрЭРђ рЭРІрЭР®рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЪрЭРЫрЭР®рЭРѓрЭРЮ.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.description:

а¶≠а¶ња¶°а¶ња¶Уа¶§аІЗ а¶ѓа¶Њ а¶ѓа¶Њ а¶•а¶Ња¶Ха¶ЫаІЗ:

Franklin-а¶Па¶∞ а¶ЄаІЗа¶∞а¶Њ а¶єа¶Ња¶За¶°а¶ња¶В а¶ЄаІНа¶™а¶Яа•§

Hulk-а¶Па¶∞ а¶§а¶Ња¶®аІНа¶°а¶ђ а¶Жа¶∞ а¶Жа¶ХаІНа¶∞а¶Ѓа¶£а•§

Indian Bike Driving 3D-а¶Па¶∞ а¶®а¶§аІБа¶® а¶Ха¶ња¶ЫаІБ а¶Ъа¶ња¶Я а¶ХаІЛа¶° а¶Па¶ђа¶В а¶ЯаІНа¶∞а¶ња¶Ха¶Єа•§

snippet.title: а∞Ха∞Ња∞≥а∞≠а±Иа∞∞а∞µ а∞Еа∞Ја±На∞Яа∞Ха∞В | Kalabhairava Ashtakam Telugu Full | Lord Shiva Bhakti Songs | Telugu Bhakti Songs
snippet.description:
а∞Ха∞Ња∞≥а∞≠а±Иа∞∞а∞µ а∞Еа∞Ја±На∞Яа∞Ха∞В | Kalabhairava Ashtakam Telugu Full | Lord Shiva Bhakti Songs | Telugu Bhakti Songs


Begin your day with the divine blessings of Lord Kalabhairava by listening to this full Kalabhairava Ashtakam in Telugu. These sacred bhajans are known to remove fear, provide protection, and bring spiritual strength to devotees.

This devotional collection is perfect for:
Daily prayers and meditation

snippet.title: Bromance Blooms on the Battlefield
snippet.description:
You and your Clan go together like a Hog and Rider, like a Goblin and Gold, like a Builder and a creepy smile. Show up for your bros this Valentine's Day and prove that true love never needs a balance change. Till maintenance do you part.

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇ https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇ https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok вЦЇ https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-of-clans/en/

Privacy Policy:
https://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
https://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

ParentвАЩs Guide:
https://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: I Explored the Minecraft Farlands
snippet.description:
the end of the world

I Explored the Minecraft Farlands

Unstable SMP:
вЮЬ  @FlameFragsMC 
вЮЬ  вБ®@Spokeishere 
вЮЬ  @ParrotX2 
вЮЬ  вБ®@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (all of the minecraft theme remixes!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack - Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): Cycle - Zyklus https://youtu.be/5Xx4rNUey90 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
